name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New Gemelli Messenger Bag. Today I want to share a super practical crossbody bag. The Gemelli Messenger features a simple and elegant design with a perfect score for practicality! The lightweight design and compact body make it easy to carry for shopping or trips, making you feel lively. The shoulder strap is detachable, allowing you to DIY it into a chain strap or a short underarm strap. Plus, this strap is wider, making the comfort level go up! up! up!
name_cn:
